title: Development of a Fluorescent RNA Biosensor for Dual Detection of cGAMP and c-di-GMP Signals in Live Bacteria
author: Mumbleau, Madeline
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Zip file contains the raw flow cytometry results for the following publication titled "Development of a Fluorescent RNA Biosensor for Dual Detection of cGAMP and c-di-GMP Signals in Live Bacteria." 
 Flow results are oragnized in accordance with their associated figure number.
